Class TableDAO

java.lang.Object
DB.DBController
DAO.TableDAO
public class TableDAO extends DBController
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Table entities and their persistence logic. This class provides CRUD operations for physical tables in the restaurant and includes advanced logic for finding available tables based on timestamps, seating capacity, and existing reservation overlaps.

  • Constructor Details

    • TableDAO

      public TableDAO()

  • Method Details

    • updateTableIsAvailable

      public boolean updateTableIsAvailable(int tableId, boolean isAvailable)
      Updates the general availability status of a table in the database.
      Parameters:
      tableId - the unique identifier of the table.
      isAvailable - true to mark the table as free, false to mark it as occupied.
      Returns:
      true if the database update was successful, false otherwise.

    • insertTable

      public boolean insertTable(int tableId, int seats)
      Inserts a new table record into the database.
      Parameters:
      tableId - the unique ID for the new table.
      seats - the seating capacity of the table.
      Returns:
      true if the table was successfully created, false otherwise.

    • updateTable

      public boolean updateTable(int tableId, int seats)
      Updates the seating capacity of an existing table.
      Parameters:
      tableId - the ID of the table to update.
      seats - the new seating capacity.
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful.

    • deleteTable

      public boolean deleteTable(int tableId)
      Deletes a table record from the database by its ID.
      Parameters:
      tableId - the unique identifier of the table to be removed.
      Returns:
      true if the deletion was successful.

    • GetTable

      public Table GetTable(int tableid)
      Retrieves a specific table's details by its ID.
      Parameters:
      tableid - the table ID to look for.
      Returns:
      the Table entity if found, or null otherwise.

    • GetAllTables

      public List<Table> GetAllTables()
      Retrieves a list of all tables registered in the restaurant database.
      Returns:
      a List containing all Table entities.

    • UpdateTable

      public Boolean UpdateTable(Table t)
      Updates an existing table's availability status using a Table object.
      Parameters:
      t - the Table object containing updated availability.
      Returns:
      true if the update succeeded, false otherwise.

    • DeleteTable

      public Boolean DeleteTable(Table t)
      Removes an existing table from the database using a Table object reference.
      Parameters:
      t - the Table object to be deleted.
      Returns:
      true if the deletion succeeded, false otherwise.

    • getAvailableTableAtTime

      public Table getAvailableTableAtTime(int numOfGuests, LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
      Finds the best available table for a specific date, time, and guest count. The logic ensures the table has sufficient capacity and is not currently reserved within a 2-hour window (120 minutes) of the requested time.
      Parameters:
      numOfGuests - the number of guests in the party.
      date - the requested date for the reservation.
      time - the requested time for the reservation.
      Returns:
      the smallest suitable Table if available, or null if fully booked.

    • updateTableIsFree

      public boolean updateTableIsFree(int reservationId)
      Frees a table assigned to a specific reservation and completes the reservation status. This is typically called when a customer pays or leaves the restaurant.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the ID of the reservation whose table should be released.
      Returns:
      true if the table was freed and reservation status updated successfully.

    • findAvailableTable

      public Table findAvailableTable(int guests)
      Finds a currently available table in the restaurant that best fits the guest count. "Best fit" refers to the table with the smallest capacity that can still hold the party.
      Parameters:
      guests - the number of guests.
      Returns:
      a Table object if one is found, otherwise null.

    • GetReservation

      public Reservation GetReservation(int ReservationId)
      Retrieves a full Reservation entity by its unique ID. Includes conversion of SQL Date/Time types to LocalDate and LocalTime.
      Parameters:
      ReservationId - the unique identifier of the reservation.
      Returns:
      the Reservation object if found, otherwise null.

    • getAffectedReservations

      public List<Reservation> getAffectedReservations(int tableId, int newCapacity, boolean isDeletion)
      Identifies reservations assigned to a specific table that can no longer exist due to table deletion or a reduction in seating capacity. * @param tableId The ID of the modified table.
      Parameters:
      newCapacity - The new seat count (ignored if isDeletion is true).
      isDeletion - True if the table is being removed entirely.
      Returns:
      A List of Reservation objects that are now invalid.

    • cancelReservation

      private void cancelReservation(Connection con, int resId) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • mapResultSetToReservation

      private Reservation mapResultSetToReservation(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException
      Helper method to map a single row from a ResultSet into a Reservation object. * @param rs The ResultSet positioned at the desired row.
      Returns:
      A fully populated Reservation entity.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database access error occurs.

      public int GetAllSeats()

    • markAsNotified

      public boolean markAsNotified(int resId)
      Updates the reservation to mark that the user has seen the change notification. * @param resId The ID of the reservation
      Returns:
      true if successful
